sentences.english: I'm from Birmingham, Alabama. It's in the Deep South. It's a city that's been through a lot historically — a lot of industrial history, but also a lot of civil rights history.
sentences.korean: 버밍햄, 앨라배마 출신이에요. 딥 사우스에 있는, 역사적으로 많은 일을 겪은 도시예요.

sentences.english: The people are very friendly and Southern hospitality is real. The food is amazing — barbecue, soul food. It's hot and humid in the summer.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 아주 친절하고 남부의 환대는 진짜예요. 음식이 끝내줘요 — 바비큐, 소울 푸드. 여름엔 덥고 습해요.

sentences.english: I'm from Philadelphia. It's a historic city with lots of character. You have the Liberty Bell and Independence Hall. The food is great — we're famous for cheesesteaks.
sentences.korean: 필라델피아 출신이에요. 개성이 넘치는 역사적인 도시로, 자유의 종과 독립기념관이 있어요. 음식도 맛있고요.

sentences.english: There's a lot of history all around you. The people can be direct and blunt, but they're genuine. It's a great city.
sentences.korean: 주위에 역사가 가득해요. 사람들은 직설적이고 무뚝뚝할 수 있지만 진솔해요. 좋은 도시예요.

sentences.english: I'm from a small town called Melanie on the Sunshine Coast in Australia. It's very relaxed and laid-back. The beach lifestyle is central to everything.
sentences.korean: 호주 선샤인 코스트에 있는 멜라니라는 작은 마을 출신이에요. 아주 여유롭고 느긋한 곳으로, 해변 생활이 모든 것의 중심이에요.

sentences.english: Everyone knows everyone, so it's very community-oriented. The weather is beautiful year-round. It's a small-town feel in paradise.
sentences.korean: 서로 다 알아서 아주 공동체 중심이에요. 1년 내내 날씨가 좋고요. 천국 같은 작은 마을 분위기예요.

sentences.english: I'm from Toronto, Canada. It's a diverse, multicultural city with lots to do. There are different neighborhoods with different cultures and cuisines. It's very dynamic and modern.
sentences.korean: 캐나다 토론토 출신이에요. 다양하고 다문화적인 도시로 할 것이 많아요. 각기 다른 문화와 요리를 가진 동네들이 있어요.

sentences.english: The winters are cold, which is challenging, but the rest of the year is beautiful.
sentences.korean: 겨울이 추워서 힘들지만, 나머지 계절은 아름다워요.

sentences.english: I'm from Perth, Western Australia. It's a laid-back coastal city. It's very isolated from the rest of Australia because there's nothing but desert between us and the Eastern cities.
sentences.korean: 서호주 퍼스 출신이에요. 여유로운 해안 도시인데, 호주 나머지 지역과 매우 고립되어 있어요.

sentences.english: Because of that isolation, Perth has developed its own unique character and identity. The weather is beautiful, and the beaches are pristine.
sentences.korean: 그 고립 때문에 퍼스만의 독특한 성격과 정체성이 생겼어요. 날씨가 아름답고 해변이 깨끗해요.

sentences.english: I'm from Southend-on-Sea in England. It's a seaside town on the coast. It's quite quiet and peaceful, but it's still very accessible to London — only an hour away by train.
sentences.korean: 영국 사우센드온씨 출신이에요. 해안가에 있는 해변 마을로 꽤 조용하고 평화롭지만, 런던 접근성은 좋아요.

sentences.english: The town has a pier which is a classic British thing. It's a nice, relaxed place to grow up.
sentences.korean: 마을에 부두가 있는데 전형적인 영국 문화예요. 자라기에 좋은, 편안한 곳이에요.
